get.description:
Report dependency and adapter placeholder health.

Returns 200 when every hard dependency is reachable, otherwise 503 so that
HTTP-only probes (compose `curl -f`, load balancers) detect degradation.

schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Health Get

ConnectorPublic.title: ConnectorPublic
ConnectorPublic.description: Connector view exposing capability/health but NEVER credential refs.

DispositionIntentKind.title: DispositionIntentKind
DispositionIntentKind.description: Internal envelope classification; not a vendor enum.

EntitySet.title: EntitySet
EntitySet.description: Container of the six entity categories.

EventStatus.title: EventStatus
EventStatus.description: ShadowTrace internal investigation orchestration state (14 states).

EventType.title: EventType
EventType.description: Supported security event types (intro §1); extensible via scenario packs.

ImpactAssessment.title: ImpactAssessment
ImpactAssessment.description: Estimated blast radius / reversibility of an action (detailed in ISSUE-079).

ReportSection.title: ReportSection
ReportSection.description: One chapter of the structured report.

SetEventDispositionParams.title: SetEventDispositionParams
SetEventDispositionParams.description: Params for EVENT_STATUS_UPDATE (the deferred terminal disposition).

SourceDisposition.title: SourceDisposition
SourceDisposition.description: Normalized external disposition label; source_status_raw keeps the original.

SourceObjectKind.title: SourceObjectKind
SourceObjectKind.description: Canonical source object kind used for the internal discriminated union.

SourceReference.title: SourceReference
SourceReference.description:
Immutable snapshot reference to an external source object (intro §4.3).

Identity five-tuple is
``(source_product, source_tenant_id, connector_id, source_kind, source_object_id)``.
The adapter-native ``source_object_type`` and opaque ``source_concurrency_token``
do NOT participate in identity.

TargetDispositionResult.title: TargetDispositionResult
TargetDispositionResult.description: Outbound per-target result: allowlisted, no free message / raw_result.

TargetWritebackResult.title: TargetWritebackResult
TargetWritebackResult.description: Per-target writeback result (kept separate from outbound disposition result).

WritebackReadiness.title: WritebackReadiness
WritebackReadiness.description: Pre-submission condition; not an external receipt.

WritebackResponse.title: WritebackResponse
WritebackResponse.description: Redacted writeback view. ``raw_result`` is intentionally not exposed.

WritebackStatus.title: WritebackStatus
WritebackStatus.description: Only valid once a writeback command exists; null otherwise.
